_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: nhub
author: nine@nineware.dev
description: A lightweight WebSocket hub for multi-server game server architectures. Enables global chat, server-to-server messaging, and RPC communication across game servers.
startup: bash -c '[ ! -f src/index.js ] && git clone https://github.com/lt9nine/nhub.git . ; [ ! -d node_modules ] && npm install --omit=dev ; node src/index.js'

installation.script:
apt update
apt install -y git

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ -d ".git" ]; then
  echo "[nhub] Updating existing installation..."
  git fetch --all
  git reset --hard origin/main
else
  echo "[nhub] Cloning repository..."
  git clone https://github.com/lt9nine/nhub.git .
fi

echo "[nhub] Done."

variables.name: Port
variables.description: The port nhub listens on. Should match the port allocated in the panel.

variables.name: RPC Timeout (ms)
variables.description: How long nhub waits for an RPC response before sending a timeout error to the caller.

variables.name: Servers
variables.description: Comma-separated list of server_id:key pairs for authentication. Example: lobby:secret1,survival:secret2 — If left empty, nhub falls back to config.json.
